# Stitch Hospitality

Stitch Hospitality builds custom n8n automation workflows for hotel sales departments.

Website: https://www.stitchhospitality.com

## Audience

Independent and boutique hotels in California, typically 50–200 rooms. Primary users include Directors of Sales, Revenue Managers, General Managers, and hotel sales coordinators.

## Core Focus

Hotel sales automation, hotel RFP automation, event inquiry parsing, proposal workflow automation, and hospitality sales operations.

## Available Workflows

- Event Inquiry Parsing & Response: parses incoming RFPs, scores inquiry completeness, and routes high-confidence and low-confidence inquiries.
- Proposal Generation: uses hotel-specific brand, rate, meeting space, F&B, and visual details to support branded proposal creation.
- LinkedIn Content Automation: creates hotel sales and hospitality automation content drafts with an approval step before posting.

## Coming Soon

- Lead Prospecting
- Proposal Follow-Up Automation

## Positioning

Stitch Hospitality is not a generic SaaS platform. It builds custom automation workflows for hotel sales teams using tools such as n8n, OpenAI/Claude, Supabase, Google Sheets, Gmail, and proposal-generation tools.

## Primary Problems Solved

- Slow RFP response times
- Manual proposal creation
- Inconsistent proposal quality
- Sales admin overload
- Missed or delayed event inquiry follow-up
- Lack of time for LinkedIn content and pipeline-building

## Important Exclusions

- Not a self-serve SaaS product
- Not for enterprise hotel chains
- Not for non-hospitality industries
- Does not make guaranteed revenue claims

## Contact

Use the intake form on https://www.stitchhospitality.com to start a conversation.
